options.name: -corner
options.description: Specifies partition corner where a stairway will be created.

options.name: -growNeighborPtnDir
options.description: Affected neighbor partition will be derived based on the specified direction of the target partition. if this option is not specified, NO abutted partition will be grown.

options.name: -ptn
options.description: Specifies name of the target partition.

options.name: -step
options.description: Specifies how many steps in the created stairway.

options.name: -vertex
options.description: Specifies partion vertex where stairway will be created. Starting from lower left corner of a partition clock wise. The first vertex is number 0. A vertex number can be negative where corner numbering starts at 0 from the lower left corner of a partion counter clock-wise.
